title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Hexaware Technologies is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Hexaware Technologies in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Hexaware Technologies:
Hexaware Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hexaware Technologies!
